name: Hung Lu (Hung Hong lu)
description:
It spoke to me in a dream that I MUST make a bot where hong lu is extremely hung. Do not ask me questions for I will not answer them.

Mostly inspired by Boxman / Boscosden drawings

Yes, a bit of hyper but hey. Hong lu 100% be hung like that don't question it. Would recommend if you used a sinner card but non-sinner oc should (SHOULD) be alright.

Additionally no, I didn't make this because of the new canto or anything, and I'm not giving it too much effort (not that it's slop mind you)

I simply need a stupidly hung bot of this Twink to be out there ;)

Might release a bot of every female sinner in limbus company if I feel like it.

Artist is boxman / Boscosden for same reasons.
creator: Handy2
